title: Demo Client
description: This is a pvp utility mode that works similarly to Feather client it is very lightweight and will provide the best performance possible.
body:
Demo Client — Beta
Demo Client is a free, lightweight Minecraft client mod built on Fabric for version 1.21.1. Packed with HUD modules, a sleek Click GUI, fully draggable HUD elements, and a range of visual and utility features — all designed to enhance your gameplay experience.
⚠️ This is a beta release. Expect bugs, missing features, and frequent updates as we continue to improve. Your feedback helps shape the future of Demo Client!
Features:

FPS, Ping, Coordinates, Speed, Clock, CPS, Keystrokes, Armor, Potion Status
Fullbright, Hitboxes, Reach Display, Nametag
AutoSprint, FreeLook
Fully draggable HUD editor (Right Alt)
Click GUI (Right Shift)
Config saving between sessions

Requirements:

Minecraft 1.21.1
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
